title: jurinea fontqueri
intro: Jurinea fontqueri, also known as Jurinea, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, native to the Iberian Peninsula and parts of North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a natural anti-spasmodic. The health benefits of Jurinea include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its ability to provide pain relief for conditions like arthritis. Herbal preparations of Jurinea typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to create teas or applied topically as a poultice.
